rationale: The DOI-matched reference (10.1509/jmr.11.0466) is a close topical and methodological predecessor: the cited paper models cross-channel effects of online display/traditional/search ads on offline and online sales with carryover, while the citing paper models banner effects on website visits and offline purchases with within- and cross-campaign effects. Given this strong overlap in constructs (display/banner ads, online–offline effects, dynamics), this does not look like an incidental background citation.
